case_title: BARBARA TORREY et al VS. PABLO ESPINOZA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2008 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-19-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-19-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER ALEJANDRA SIROKA PRESENT ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO RUTH BALLARD.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORREY, BARBARA BALLARD, RUTH IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, PABLO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
